metadata.course_name: Essentials of Work and Study in Research and Technology 1

content.department: Department of Computer Graphics and Multimedia | (UPGM)
content.learning_objectives: Help student, often coming to the english masters programme from a foreign institution, to get oriented in the organization of studies at FIT BUT and to sucessfully start their masters studies at FIT BUT.Overview of organization of study at FIT BUT. Understanding of principles of individual engineering work and self-study. Selection of suitable courses that will form a coherent and manageable individual study plan of the student.Communication with the Patron. Self-management and planning of own study and focus.
